normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU2_common_subseq_witness (a b : Arr) :
  ∃ ia ib : List Nat,
    CommonSubseq a b ia ib ∧ ia.length = lcsLength a b
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: There exists a common subsequence whose length matches the returned LCS length.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU3_maximal (a b : Arr) (ia ib : List Nat)
  (h : CommonSubseq a b ia ib) :
  ia.length ≤ lcsLength a b
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: No common subsequence is strictly longer than the returned value.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU1_length_bounds (a b : Arr) :
  lcsLength a b ≤ a.length ∧ lcsLength a b ≤ b.length
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: The LCS length never exceeds either input length.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement: theorem SU5_symmetry (a b : Arr) : lcsLength a b = lcsLength b a
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: LCS length is symmetric in the two inputs.
